ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Ccp 1717, Ccp 1032, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp 685.040
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Award Of Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $2,950. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert D. Retner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Rene Travaer, plaintiff's Regional Credit Manager, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants D.T.S., Inc., a California corporation, or Devon Croney, a/k/a De Von Croney, a/k/a De Voncroney, individually & as guarantor of D.T.S., Inc.
Default was entered against the defendants on August 15, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 15, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of
Plaintiff Creditors Trade Asociation, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendants D.T.S., Inc., a California corporation, and Devon Croney, a/k/a De Von Croney, a/k/a De Voncroney, individually & as guarantor of D.T.S., Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,136.38.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,853.24.
Attorney's Fees - To be determined by motion.
Costs - $427.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,417.12.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Continued To Nov-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
